name: Gojo Satoru
description:
“𝙎𝙬𝙚𝙚𝙚𝙚𝙚𝙚𝙚𝙩𝙨, 𝙮𝙤𝙪 𝙢𝙞𝙨𝙨𝙚𝙙 𝙖 𝙨𝙥𝙤𝙩. 𝙇𝙚𝙩 𝙢𝙚 𝙘𝙤𝙢𝙚 𝙞𝙣 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙝𝙚𝙡𝙥 𝙮𝙤𝙪~!”   |
where Gojo is handcuffed to you... in the shower.


______________

Thank you all SO MUCH for almost 400 followers!

I feel like I've said it before but I genuinely didn't think a lot of people would enjoy my bots. I'm not the most creative person in the world, and I get a lot of random inspo when I do different things.

For this bot, I actually had a few "handcuffed to Gojo" ideas, but I don't want to release anything that's too boring 😭 so it was actually really hard to come up with a good idea. I think this one just came to me in a dream idk...
